name: Masscan
categoryDescription: Commonly abused tools that leave NO Windows registry artifacts. These tools are typically single executables, portable builds, or in-memory frameworks. Detection depends entirely on non-registry evidence: process execution logs, prefetch, ShimCache/Amcache, BAM/DAM, network traffic, and memory forensics. Includes detection notes for each tool.
description: Extremely fast Internet-scale port scanner capable of scanning the entire IPv4 internet in under 6 minutes. Always portable, no installer, no registry. Single binary.
forensic_value: No registry artifacts. The traffic pattern is unique — extremely high SYN rate from a single host. Network-level detection is primary. Rate limiting on egress may trigger errors in masscan output.
